prompt.description: Text describing what you wish to see in the output image.

negative_prompt.description: Text describing elements to exclude from the output image.

image.description: An optional input image for image-to-image generation. When provided, the model uses this image as a reference guided by the strength parameter.

strength.description: Controls how much influence the input image has on the output. Lower values produce images closer to the input, higher values allow more creative deviation. Only applicable for image-to-image mode.

aspect_ratio.description: Controls the aspect ratio of the generated image. Only applicable for text-to-image mode.

model.description: The Stable Diffusion 3 model variant to use for generation.

seed.description: A value to control randomness in generation.

output_format.description: The output format of the generated image.

mode.description: The generation mode. Use text-to-image for prompt-only generation or image-to-image when providing a reference image.
